taskSummary: Fix the production /api/ai-rewrite path after PR #428 reached main but Step 1 still showed Suggestions are temporarily unavailable.
productionEvidence: research-operations.com /api/ai-rewrite?mode=description returned 503 AI_UNAVAILABLE from main Worker SHA afb13173d115e03c24b11ae48fa5eb1860d647e7
response headers showed the Pages advanced Worker proxy reached the expected upstream Worker
rootCause: The AI rewrite service returned 503 AI_UNAVAILABLE whenever env.AI.run threw. PR #428 fixed origin/proxy access, but the upstream Worker still failed at the Workers AI runtime call and the UI had no structured response to render.
implementation: Added deterministic server-side review and rewrite fallback for missing AI binding, thrown Workers AI calls and invalid model output.
Returned fallback output with HTTP 200 and flags.ai_unavailable true.
Removed bracketed placeholder fallback from the live response path.
Changed Step 1 and Step 2 panels to say Review summary and to report rule-based suggestions when fallback output is shown.

validation.command: local response-shape check with missing AI binding
validation.result: returned 200, flags.ai_unavailable true, 3 suggestions and rewrite beginning with Research focus

validation.command: npx prettier -c infra/cloudflare/src/core/ai-rewrite.js infra/cloudflare/src/core/ai-rewrite/fallback.js public/js/start-description-assist.js public/js/start-objectives-assist.js tests/ai-rewrite-ai-fallback.test.js tests/ai-rewrite-split-route-state.test.js

npx eslint infra/cloudflare/src/core/ai-rewrite.js infra/cloudflare/src/core/ai-rewrite/fallback.js public/js/start-description-assist.js public/js/start-objectives-assist.js tests/ai-rewrite-ai-fallback.test.js tests/ai-rewrite-split-route-state.test.js
validation.result: passed with no errors; reported no-console warnings from audit/client diagnostics

residualRisk: The user-facing feature remains useful during Workers AI failures, but production Worker logs should still be reviewed for ai.run.fail to diagnose why the live Workers AI call failed.
